revision.comment: Fix 1-2 years in the future at year magnitude
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|0}}=0 or abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12)) >= 12

|<!-- in years -->{{#expr:floor(abs( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ))}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr:ceil( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = -1|year's|years'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr:floor( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = 1|year|years}}
}}

|<!-- in months -->{{#expr:abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) )}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = -1|month's|months'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = 1|month|months}}
}}

}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0|time|ago}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|0}}=0 or abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12)) >= 12

|<!-- in years -->{{#expr:floor(abs( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ))}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr:ceil( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = -1|year's|years'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr:floor( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = 1|year|years}}
}}

|<!-- in months -->{{#expr:abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) )}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = -1|month's|months'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = 1|month|months}}
}}

}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0|time|ago}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|0}}=0 or abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12)) >= 12

|<!-- in years -->{{#expr:floor(abs( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ))}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr:ceil( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = -1|year's|years'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr:floor( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = 1|year|years}}
}}

|<!-- in months -->{{#expr:abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) )}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = -1|month's|months'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = 1|month|months}}
}}

}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0|time|ago}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|0}}=0 or abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12)) >= 12

|<!-- in years -->{{#expr:floor(abs( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ))}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr:ceil( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = -1|year's|years'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr:floor( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = 1|year|years}}
}}

|<!-- in months -->{{#expr:abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) )}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = -1|month's|months'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = 1|month|months}}
}}

}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0|time|ago}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|0}}=0 or abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12)) >= 12

|<!-- in years -->{{#expr:floor(abs( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ))}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr:ceil( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = -1|year's|years'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr:floor( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = 1|year|years}}
}}

|<!-- in months -->{{#expr:abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) )}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = -1|month's|months'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = 1|month|months}}
}}

}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0|time|ago}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|0}}=0 or abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12)) >= 12

|<!-- in years -->{{#expr:floor(abs( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ))}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr:ceil( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = -1|year's|years'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr:floor( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = 1|year|years}}
}}

|<!-- in months -->{{#expr:abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) )}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = -1|month's|months'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = 1|month|months}}
}}

}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0|time|ago}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23697958099|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|0}}=0 or abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12)) >= 12

|<!-- in years -->{{#expr:floor(abs( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ))}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr:ceil( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = -1|year's|years'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr:floor( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = 1|year|years}}
}}

|<!-- in months -->{{#expr:abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) )}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = -1|month's|months'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = 1|month|months}}
}}

}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0|time|ago}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|0}}=0 or abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12)) >= 12

|<!-- in years -->{{#expr:floor(abs( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ))}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr:ceil( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = -1|year's|years'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr:floor( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = 1|year|years}}
}}

|<!-- in months -->{{#expr:abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) )}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|<!-- future -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = -1|month's|months'}}
|<!-- past/current -->{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = 1|month|months}}
}}

}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0|time|ago}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|1|0}}=0 or abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12)) >= 12

|{{#expr:floor(abs( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ))}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|{{#ifexpr:ceil( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = -1|year's|years'}}
|{{#ifexpr:floor( ( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) ) / 12 ) = 1|year|years}}
}}

|{{#expr:abs( ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) )}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0
|{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = -1|month's|months'}}
|{{#ifexpr: ({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) = 1|month|months}}
}}

}} {{#ifexpr:({{{4|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{3|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) - ({{{2|{{CURRENTMONTH}}}}}+{{{1|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}}*12) < 0|time|ago}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
